name: Electronic Gourmet's Garlic and Herb Salad Dr
recipeInstructions:
1) Combine all ingredients in a small jar with a tight-fitting lid. Let stand at room temperature for at least 1 hour, or longer for best results.
2) Shake the mixture well and use to dress any crisp green salad. Store in the refrigerator for up to 4-5 days. Always shake before using.
